subcodes.title: Words to Juliet Thompson, spoken on 1912-07-18
subcodes.first_line: I wish you to teach constantly. Therein lies your happiness, and My happiness... I wish you to be detached from the entire world of existence, to turn to the Kingdom of Abha with a pure heart
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
